$source-of-truth: docs/sprint-progress.json. Updated as agents return + commit. Read by apps/portal/Components/Pages/Sprint.razor.

currentSprint.name: Followup Sweep (FU-2 .. FU-7)
currentSprint.goal: Drain the small-followups queue from Sprint 1-2 retrospectives. Six parallel-safe items, six agents, one merge cycle. Per PLAN.md §17.

items.title: /cases/{guid} foreign-tenant 404 instead of 200-with-empty-state
items.notes: CaseDetail.razor: set HttpContext.Response.StatusCode=404 when EF query returns null. Flip E1's existing 1f assertion.

items.title: Source-blob cross-tenant SHA-256 collision defense doc + flag
items.notes: Doc section + ImagingOptions.EnforceCrossTenantBlobGuard flag (declared, not enforced). Enforcement is future sprint.

items.title: Cleanup stale __EFMigrationsHistory row 20260427164643_Add_ScanRenderArtifact
items.notes: New EF migration on InspectionDbContext, single DELETE, irreversible Down.

items.title: Document dotnet ef env-var passthrough quirk on Windows
items.notes: Doc-only. New section in docs/RUNBOOK.md or new docs/MIGRATIONS.md.

items.title: Drop public.__EFMigrationsHistory from both DBs
items.notes: EF migration(s). Probe both DBs first, only ship a migration where the table exists.

items.title: Rename ExternalSystems.Abstractions.AuthorityDocument → AuthorityDocumentDto
items.notes: DTO rename (entity keeps the cleaner name). Touches IcumsGh + Mock adapters + CaseWorkflowService + tests.

resolvedDecisions.title: ITenantContext.SetSystemContext mechanism
resolvedDecisions.resolution: option 2 — explicit IsSystem flag + SetSystemContext() + sentinel '-1' + per-table RLS opt-in clauses + system-context audit register

gated.reason: domain shape — Petty Cash voucher / custodian / ledger / approval / currency. User delivers ~6 product calls before it ships.
edge-node conflict-resolution semantics likely needs a design call mid-sprint; rolling master may halt on it.

outOfScope.reason: Owns its own master spawn. docs/IMAGE-ANALYSIS-MODERNIZATION.md is the design source. User has parallel work in progress (Inference.Abstractions, Inference.Mock, Inference.OnnxRuntime, tools/v1-label-export/) — not touched by rolling master.
